name: editor-tweaks
description: Toggle quotes, highlight current line, remove tabs on save, prune stale recently-opened entries, auto-refresh git status, and file history — small utilities in one extension.
author: euxx

scripts.ci: npm run syntax && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test

commands.title: Editor Tweaks: File History — Open History Folder

editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderColor.description: Bottom border color of the current line highlight (CSS color value). Leave empty to disable.

editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderStyle.description: Bottom border style of the current line highlight.

editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderWidth.patternErrorMessage: Must be a CSS length value (e.g. '1px', '0.5em').
editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderWidth.description: Bottom border width of the current line highlight (CSS length value).

editorTweaks.toggleQuotes.chars.description: Quote characters to cycle through. Each entry must be a single character.

editorTweaks.removeTabsOnSave.excludePat.markdownDescription:
Patterns to skip tab removal for. Each entry can be:
- A **language ID** (e.g. `makefile`) — matched against the document's language
- An **exact filename** (e.g. `GNUmakefile`) — matched against the file's basename
- A **glob** containing `*` (e.g. `*.go`, `prefix_*.txt`, `*_suffix.go`) — matched against the file's basename

Defaults to `makefile` and `*.go` since those file types require tab characters.

editorTweaks.pruneOpenHistory.runAtStart.description: Automatically prune open history each time VS Code starts.

editorTweaks.pruneOpenHistory.maxItems.markdownDescription: Maximum number of local (`file://`) entries to keep per category in the **recently-opened list** (workspaces and files are counted separately). Oldest entries are removed first. Set to `-1` for no limit. Does not apply to the Go-to-File history.

editorTweaks.gitAutoRefresh.enable.description: Periodically call git.refresh so that the SCM Changes view stays current even when VS Code is not focused.

editorTweaks.gitAutoRefresh.intervalSec.description: How often (in seconds) to refresh git status. Minimum 1 s. Default is 10 s.

editorTweaks.fileHistory.enable.description: Enable automatic file snapshots on save.

editorTweaks.fileHistory.historyPath.description: Root storage path for file history snapshots. Supports ~ and $ENV_VAR.

editorTweaks.fileHistory.minIntervalSeco.description: Minimum seconds between snapshots of the same file. Set to 1 for near-continuous backup.

editorTweaks.fileHistory.maxVersionsPerF.description: Maximum number of snapshots to keep per file. Oldest snapshots are deleted first.

editorTweaks.fileHistory.maxDays.description: Delete snapshots older than this many days. Cleanup runs once on extension activation.

editorTweaks.fileHistory.maxFileSizeKB.description: Skip files larger than this size (in KB). Protects against snapshotting binaries and generated files.

editorTweaks.fileHistory.excludePatterns.markdownDescription: Glob patterns of files to exclude from snapshots. Matched against workspace-relative paths (or absolute paths for files outside a workspace). Paths are normalized to `/` separators before matching.
